name: Lunalight Tiger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>月光虎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ムーンライト・タイガー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn: You can target 1 "Lunalight" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but it cannot attack, its effects are negated, also it is destroyed during the End Phase.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can target 1 "Lunalight" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Lunalight Tiger" once per turn.
pend_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 "Lunalight" monster in your GY; Special Summon it, but it cannot attack, its effects are negated, also it is destroyed during the End Phase.
mnst_eff: If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can target 1 "Lunalight" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Lunalight Tiger" once per turn.
eff: If this card on the field is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can target 1 "Lunalight" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Lunalight Tiger" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
